designNotes.aesthetic: A sun faded workshop broadsheet using warm paper, dark mechanical linework, rust accents, and spare Tucson terrain geometry. Large editorial serif headings remain the visual anchor while practical copy now has enough size and contrast to carry equal importance.
designNotes.signatureMove: The service section pairs a sticky illustrated wheel with the complete numbered repair list. The wheel turns with page progress on precise pointer devices and remains still on touch screens and when reduced motion is requested.
designNotes.rationale: The revision preserves the distinctive desert workshop identity while raising navigation, labels, service descriptions, visit copy, and footer text to readable sizes. Mobile hero spacing is tighter, the rust panel is darker for stronger contrast, and the approach section now gives a direct recap of confirmed services instead of repeating broad values. Missing visit and contact details are handled with one concise honest line.
